@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw)
C: min_diff ∧ skew("30") ∧ next("err")
P: load(auth_mw) ∧ cmp(expMs,nowMs-"30") ∧ Δ(expMs<nowMs,expMs<=nowMs-"30") ∧ emit("401")
V: test(boundary_"30") ∧ test(just_over_"30") ∧ test(refresh_loop)
A: patch(expMs<=nowMs-"30") ∧ reg_test(skew_"30")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth middleware).
Constraints: minimal diff and skew("30") and next("err").
Plan: load(auth middleware) and cmp(expMs, nowMs-"30") and Δ(expMs<nowMs, expMs<=nowMs-"30") and emit("401").
Verify: test(boundary_"30") and test(just_over_"30") and test(refresh_loop).
Answer target: patch(expMs<=nowMs-"30") and regression test(skew_"30").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: decide(arch)
C: team("6") ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: score(dev_speed) ∧ score(ops_cost) ∧ score(split_readiness) ∧ defer(split(post_release))
V: ship("4 months") ∧ seams(clean) ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
A: modular_monolith ∧ why(small_team ∧ short_ddl ∧ low_ops)

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(arch).
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: score(dev_speed) and score(ops_cost) and score(split_readiness) and defer(split(post_release)).
Verify: ship("4 months") and seams(clean) and store("PostgreSQL").
Answer target: modular_monolith and why(small_team and short_ddl and low ops).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review_patch
C: trust_boundary ∧ session_auth ∧ public_api_gateway
P: drop("x-user-id") ∧ bind(session.userId) ∧ return("401")
V: test(spoof_header) ∧ test(missing_session) ∧ test(cross_user_denial)
A: impersonation_risk ∧ horizontal_privesc ∧ next(err)_path

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: preserve_order ∧ keep("next(err)") ∧ minimal_change
P: "async" → "await" ∧ check(missing_id) → db.findUser → branch(not_found) → audit.log → cache.set
V: test(missing_id) ∧ test(not_found) ∧ test("next(err)") ∧ test(no_double_cb)
A: async_await ∧ single_error_map ∧ literal("next(err)")

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: preserve execution order and keep("next(err)") and minimal_change.
Plan: "async" then "await" and check(missing_id) then db.findUser then branch(not_found) then audit.log then cache.set.
Verify: test(missing_id) and test(not_found) and test("next(err)") and test(no_double_cb).
Answer target: async/await and single_error_map and literal("next(err)").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("heapUsed")
C: min_diff ∧ preserve(next(err)) ∧ no_new_trust
P: audit("setInterval") ∧ null("batch_rows") ∧ extract(closure) ∧ clear_ref_each_tick
V: test(heap_stable_empty_queue) ∧ test(heap_stable_after_drain) ∧ test(no_leak_10k_ticks)
A: root_cause("retained closure over batch rows") ∧ min_fix("null refs + hoist handler") ∧ reg_test("heapUsed flat across ticks")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("heapUsed").
Constraints: minimal diff and preserve(next(err)) and no_new_trust.
Plan: audit("setInterval") and null("batch_rows") and extract(closure) and clear_ref_each_tick.
Verify: test(heap_stable_empty_queue) and test(heap_stable_after_drain) and test(no_leak_10k_ticks).
Answer target: root_cause("retained closure over batch rows") and minimal fix("null refs + hoist handler") and regression test("heapUsed flat across ticks").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design(audit_log_schema)
C: compliance_export ∧ partition(month) ∧ retain("7 years") ∧ lean_ops
P: table(audit_log) → cols(id bigserial, ts timestamptz, actor_id, action, target, meta "JSONB") → partition_by(range(ts), monthly) → idx(ts, actor_id, action) → attach(pg_partman) → export(copy_to_parquet)
V: test(monthly_rollover) ∧ test(export_roundtrip) ∧ test(retain("7 years"))
A: schema_sketch ∧ partitioning_strategy("PostgreSQL" native range monthly via pg_partman) ∧ why(cheap_ops ∧ query_locality ∧ drop_old_partition_fast)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review(rate_limiter)
C: public_edge ∧ trust_boundary
P: spoof("X-Forwarded-For") ⇒ bypass(limit) ∧ pin(trusted_proxy_chain) ∧ bind(req.ip) ∧ validate("Redis")(key_scope)
V: test(spoof_xff) ∧ test(missing_xff) ∧ test(multi_hop_xff) ∧ test(ipv6_normalize)
A: drop_untrusted_xff ∧ use(req.ip) ∧ mitigation(signed_gateway_assertion)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: extract("@atlas/currency")
C: preserve_call_sites ∧ minimal_diff ∧ keep("package.json")
P: inventory_dupes → unify_api → new_pkg → replace_imports → remove_locals
V: unit(billing) ∧ unit(audit) ∧ unit(gateway) ∧ snapshot(format_outputs)
A: plan("semver" 0.1.0_initial) ∧ bump(minor_on_api_add) ∧ bump(major_on_format_change)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design(webhook_idempotency)
C: preserve("Idempotency-Key") ∧ dedup ∧ observable_replays ∧ store(PostgreSQL)
P: extract("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(dedup_table) → on_conflict(return_cached) → else(process ∧ persist_result)
V: unit(first_call) ∧ unit(duplicate→cached) ∧ unit(concurrent_race) ∧ unit(missing_key→"409")
A: dedup_strategy(unique_idx ∧ cached_response) ∧ error_model(missing_key⇒"409" ∧ provider_5xx_safe_retry) ∧ short_why(provider_retries_need_stable_key)

[AUDIT]
Goal: design(webhook_idempotency).
Constraints: preserve("Idempotency-Key") and dedup and observable_replays and store(PostgreSQL).
Plan: extract("Idempotency-Key") then upsert(dedup_table) then on_conflict(return_cached) then else(process and persist_result).
Verify: unit(first_call) and unit(duplicate then cached) and unit(concurrent_race) and unit(missing_key then "409").
Answer target: dedup_strategy(unique_idx and cached_response) and error_model(missing_key implies "409" and provider_5xx_safe_retry) and short rationale(provider_retries_need_stable_key).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("N+1")
C: preserve(shape) ∧ min_diff
H: "db.findUser" ∧ loop ⇒ n_plus_one
P: batch(customer_ids) → Δ(findUsers_in) → map(row→user)
V: regression_test(latency) ∧ shape_equal
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("N+1").
Constraints: preserve(shape) and minimal diff.
Hypothesis: "db.findUser" and loop implies n_plus_one.
Plan: batch(customer_ids) then Δ(findUsers_in) then map(row then user).
Verify: regression_test(latency) and shape_equal.
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test.
